title: ace's RPG modpack
description: rpg modpack with lots of structures and bosses!
body:
![BoxToPlay sponsor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8b7363c6efe6ca2a42eac08732aedec25d355ab.png) Check out BoxToPlay for cheap and powerful minecraft servers (seriously, it's the one I use daily, it's great) ## features: **-Incredible worldgen with cool looking terrain and huge natural structures!\ -Hundreds of new structures for you to explore!\ -20+ Bosses!\ -Hours of gameplay!**\ \ you will need a pretty decent pc to run this do be aware
